# Foundations of Nature-based solutions

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Defining NbS for engineering applications.  
- Problem-centric typology of NbS.  
- Existing guidelines and standards (global, national, and regional).  
- Principles of engineering design of NBS


## Example Heading 2

Content goes here.  

### Example Subheading

Content goes here. Figure \@ref(fig:fig-ASCE2) automatic referencing looks like this. 

```{r fig-ASCE2, fig.cap="Example of another figure"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/00_ASCE_logo.png")
```
